summary: Senior React Frontend Engineer with 12+ years of professional experience building production web applications across B2B SaaS, enterprise platforms, marketplaces, and Web3 security. Strong fit for developer-facing products that need clear interfaces for complex systems, with hands-on React, TypeScript, Redux, Zustand, REST API integration, and live or frequently updated data experiences. Shipped measurable results including cutting monorepo build times from about 15 minutes to 3 minutes, improving API response times by 35%, and reducing release cycles from one week to less than 24 hours.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Co-led OpenZeppelin Defender 2.0 Secure Audit as one of two engineers, building a React and TypeScript frontend with Zustand state management so smart contract auditors could track findings, verify fixes, and deliver final PDF reports with clients.
Built SDK capabilities for Defender and OSS Relayer so Web3 developers and technical teams could integrate the products and build custom automation tooling.
Led end-to-end testing for Defender with Playwright on critical user flows, improving release confidence for a complex production frontend.
Refactored the TypeScript monorepo build system, cutting build times from about 15 minutes to 3 minutes in local and CI runs while reducing bundle size and speeding up pull request cycles.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Built a React and TypeScript presentation feature in MyPremise that surfaced up-to-date, often live data through a single shareable URL for account managers and clients.
Helped migrate key entities to GraphQL with Apollo, including Express.js service updates, improving API response times by 35% and lowering server usage.
Improved release reliability with broader Jest coverage and GitHub Actions quality gates, cutting release cycles from one week to less than 24 hours.
Standardized UI work with Material UI and Storybook, reducing prototyping time from one week to one day and improving consistency across shared components.
Built an internal AI proof of concept for natural-language report generation.

workExperience.title: System Architect
description: Improved architecture and delivery for a legacy internal platform, working with product, engineering, and infrastructure teams to reduce delivery cycles from months to about two weeks.
Worked across frontend modernization efforts that included React, Redux, and Angular while the platform moved away from Internet Explorer-only constraints and toward modern browser support.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Implemented real-time catalog and pricing updates with Go and Kafka, moving core logic from a previous Python ETL flow so product and discount changes reached the app faster and contributed to a 21% increase in CSAT.

workExperience.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Delivered more than five web and mobile products end to end across medical, industrial, government, legal, and cultural sectors.
Led architecture decisions and set engineering standards for TypeScript, React, React Native, and Redux across the company.
Mentored five developers through pairing, code reviews, and workshops focused on architecture, testing, and code quality.

workExperience.title: Fullstack Developer
description: Helped build Dxpress from idea to launch inside a small product and engineering team, focusing on geolocation, real-time operational features, and product ETL workflows across Python and Go services.

workExperience.title: Junior Software Developer
description: Started as a junior developer and took on growing frontend ownership, helping introduce Node.js and AngularJS into the agency stack.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

company_profile.description: Based on the recruiter-provided job description only, x4-tech-1 is a confidential venture-backed startup building a platform for interaction between AI agents, developers, and enterprise systems.
company_profile.mission: Inferred from JD: make complex AI-agent workflows easier to use through clear, high-performance product interfaces.
company_profile.vision: Inferred from JD: give developers and enterprise teams practical control over AI-agent systems through intuitive tooling.
